project.name: Cosmology Lens
project.goal: Analyze the cosmological commitments represented in text, compare them with sourced cosmologies, expose implied values using MAI resources, and report calibrated uncertainty.

tasks.title: Create the project operating contract and state tracker
acceptance: State validates
Status report can be generated
One-task concurrency is enforced
Anti-loop rules are explicit
tasks.completion_summary: Repository-local operating contract, readiness rubric, task state, and control CLI created and verified.

tasks.title: Persist source provenance and establish GitHub version control
acceptance: Scholarly and project sources are stored in a machine-readable website-ready registry
The citation contract preserves provenance, access dates, usage, and review status
Generated dependencies, local environments, and likely secrets are excluded from version control
The project is committed and pushed to abulovic/cosmological-playground
tasks.completion_summary: Website-ready source provenance, citation rules, secret-safe ignores, and GitHub version control are established; registry tests pass and origin/main was verified at commit a97d34e.

tasks.title: Review and freeze the cosmological primitive ontology
acceptance: Every primitive has a definition, allowed evidence states, and counterexamples
At least two scholarly worldview frameworks are compared
Scope boundary between cosmology and values is explicit
tasks.completion_summary: Frozen ontology v1 with twelve operationally bounded primitives, common evidence semantics, voice-aware exact-span rules, scholarly framework comparison, cosmology/value separation, difficult-case fixtures, and schema-alignment tests.

tasks.title: Validate the cosmology-card schema with three contrasting cards
acceptance: Cards validate against schema
Claims have source provenance and scope notes
Contested and absent claims are representable

tasks.title: Freeze confidence semantics and abstention policy
acceptance: Coverage, fit, and calibrated confidence are distinct
Abstention triggers are testable
Unvalidated confidence is visibly provisional

tasks.title: Verify web and API health-check scaffolds
acceptance: Web build succeeds
API health test passes
Environment contract is documented
tasks.completion_summary: Pinned dependencies installed; Next.js production build and lint pass; FastAPI health contract passes in the local virtual environment.

tasks.title: Curate the first 24 scoped cosmology cards
acceptance: At least 24 cards validate
Every card is historically scoped
Every substantive claim has scholarly or primary-source provenance
A review-needed flag identifies unreviewed claims

tasks.title: Import and normalize available MAI value-card data
acceptance: Source version and license status are recorded
Value cards remain distinct from moral-graph edges
Normalization is reproducible

tasks.title: Build hybrid retrieval over cosmology claims and value cards
acceptance: Keyword and embedding retrieval are combined
Retrieval returns provenance
A deterministic fallback works without embeddings

tasks.title: Implement bounded text, URL, PDF, and DOCX ingestion
acceptance: All four input types produce normalized segments
URL fetching blocks private-network targets and excessive payloads
Failures are explicit and recoverable

tasks.title: Implement voice, quotation, negation, and stance extraction
acceptance: Claims retain exact source spans
Endorsement is separated from quotation, criticism, reporting, and fiction
Sparse evidence remains unobserved rather than inferred

tasks.title: Implement primitive-level comparison and candidate ranking
acceptance: Comparisons expose entailment through contradiction
Scores retain primitive-level evidence
Hybrid and no-good-match results are supported

tasks.title: Implement verified MAI value-card matching
acceptance: Every match has a supporting passage
Card similarity and graph position are labeled separately
Low-confidence mappings abstain

tasks.title: Build the evidence-bearing analysis interface
acceptance: Users can submit supported inputs
Rankings, primitive matrix, source spans, values, and uncertainty are visible
JSON and Markdown export work

tasks.title: Create and human-review the evaluation set
acceptance: Canonical, mixed, sparse, quoted, negated, fictional, and out-of-distribution texts are represented
Labels record reviewer and rationale
Calibration split is held out

tasks.title: Measure ranking quality and calibrate confidence
acceptance: Top-1, recall@3, Brier score, calibration error, and abstention metrics are reported
Calibration uses held-out labels
Weak results remain visibly provisional

tasks.title: Harden, document, and prepare a bounded pilot
acceptance: Privacy, cost, size, SSRF, timeout, and failure controls are tested
Methodology and limitations are user-visible
A pilot operator can reproduce setup and recovery
